title: After the Takarazuka Kinen: Collaborative ★ Runaway!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer and Daitaku Helios run together in
the Takarazuka Kinen. They push each other on
and both cross the finish line.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the race, we learn that Grandmother Mejiro
actually is in the crowd. In contrast to Mejiro
Palmer's visible agitation and embarrassment, she
seems ever so slightly amused.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our next goal is the autumn Tenno Sho. It's time
to try again to see if she can run freely in a
prestigious race.
